preset_local_only_desc: Everything runs on your machine. Private, offline, no recurring cost.
preset_cloud_cinematic_desc: Anthropic Claude + Replicate FLUX-Pro + Kling. Best quality.
preset_hybrid_desc: Cloud conversation, local image. Balance quality and cost.
preset_text_only_desc: Pure narrative, no image/video. Choose any chat provider.
preset_manual_desc: Start with blank settings; configure everything yourself.
preset_step_desc: Pick a starting configuration. You can change everything later in Settings.
step1_title: Pull up a chair by the fire
step1_desc: Your AI Game Master is waiting at the table. They will weave the story, run the world, and roll the dice. No party required - just bring your imagination.
chat_local_desc: Download Qwen3.5-4B Q4_K_M (~2.5 GB) to run the AI locally. Private, offline, no API cost.
chat_cloud_desc: Configure an OpenAI-compatible cloud provider (OpenRouter recommended) to run the Dungeon Master.
chat_text_only_desc: Configure an OpenAI-compatible cloud provider, or skip to set one up later.
image_step_desc: Generate scene art alongside your adventure. You can change this later in Settings.
image_cpu_offload_enabled: CPU offload is enabled automatically to free VRAM for the LLM when both are loaded.
replicate_key_hint: Get one at replicate.com - used for FLUX-Pro image generation.
video_step_desc: Generate short cinematic clips during scene transitions. Powered by Kling via Replicate.
video_cost_hint: Cloud video generation has a per-clip cost. Check your Replicate usage dashboard.
video_key_reused: The Replicate API key from the previous step will be used.
video_key_missing_hint: A Replicate API key is needed to enable video generation. Go back to the image step to enter one.
cloud_base_url_hint: OpenRouter is recommended (one key, 100+ models). Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works.
cloud_api_key_hint: Get an OpenRouter key at openrouter.ai/keys
